task_statement: CR.v4 P3 hard fan-in proof-scope repair. Prove the current hard fan-in invariant without creating a new route/runtime: in hard fan-in cohorts, QA / Inspector / evidence source lanes may return local non-binding transition_concern_evidence as Agent returned evidence, but Link must not adopt, reroute, or HOLD from those source-lane concerns before closure-synthesis. Closure-synthesis remains the only Link-facing transition concern source. Preserve closure-origin concern adoption and reason_refs / related_boundary_refs safety. Do not add --large, a new scheduler, queue, retry runtime, Movement literal, target selector, or manual required_return_shape / carries_forward_fields injection. Brick templates and Builder must materialize brick.md / return.yaml / return shape / carry.

nodes.work_statement: Implement the narrow P3 proof-scope repair from the current HEAD. First inspect live templates/checkers/walker. Required outcome: (1) fan-in source nodes generated by official graph composition carry a declared advisory transition_concern_adoption or equivalent Link-owned non-adoption policy, without manual return-shape or carry-field injection; (2) dynamic walker does not adopt/reroute/HOLD before closure for valid source-lane concerns from code-attack-qa, axis-attack-qa, evidence-integrity, or inspect-style reviewer source lanes when they are fan-in sources; (3) malformed source-lane concern handling is explicitly evidenced as local Agent evidence or honest not_proven, not silently converted to Movement; (4) closure-origin transition_concern_evidence still validates and can be adopted under declared Link policy/budget; (5) checker coverage injects concern evidence from all relevant fan-in source lanes, not only fan-code-qa, and includes reason_refs / related_boundary_refs safety. Keep changes narrow. Do not edit support/operator/run.py, support/operator/dynamic_walker.py, link/**, agent/objects/**, or any Building evidence root.

Codex code/regression QA. Do not source-mutate. Do not use tool_search. Inspect changed files and run focused checkers. Attack whether all relevant fan-in source lanes are covered, whether source-lane concerns avoid pre-closure adoption/reroute/HOLD, whether closure-origin adoption/replay still works, whether reason_refs / related_boundary_refs safety still holds, and whether the patch edited outside declared write_scope.

Gemini-local Brick/Agent/Link axis QA. Do not source-mutate. Brick: templates own work contract, return shape, and carry fields. Agent: QA/Inspector/evidence source-lane concerns remain local Agent returned evidence before closure. Link: Movement remains forward/reroute only; advisory/binding adoption policy is Link-owned; closure-synthesis is the Link-facing concern source. Report exact not_proven if tool/provider limits prevent checking.

Codex closure. Fan in work, Codex code QA, and Gemini axis QA. Report FORWARD/HOLD/REROUTE/NOT_PROVEN as support evidence only. HOLD or return transition_concern_evidence if checker coverage still only proves one source lane, source-lane concern is Link-facing before closure, reason_refs / related_boundary_refs safety is broken, closure-origin adoption is broken, QA source-mutated, or work changed files outside declared scope. Do not claim success, quality, source truth, or Movement authority.

proof_limits: does not prove full customer-ready goal
